objective: Fix ao eval baseline A/B default run ID collision
validation_commands: cd cli && go run ./cmd/ao eval run ../evals/agentops-core/lid-primitives-demo.json --runtime shell --baseline-mode both --json | jq -e '.skill_on_run_id != .skill_off_run_id and (.skill_on_run_id | endswith("-skill-on")) and (.skill_off_run_id | endswith("-skill-off"))'

tracker_health.reason: bd ready --json and bd list --type epic --status open --json succeeded

done_criteria: RunBaselineAB assigns distinct -skill-on and -skill-off run IDs when --run-id is omitted.
Scorecard SkillOnRunID and SkillOffRunID match the returned per-leg records.
Contract docs describe distinct per-leg IDs for supplied and default base IDs.
Focused unit tests and CLI smoke pass.

test_levels.rationale: The defect is in one Go package with CLI-visible behavior. L1 covers the runner logic; L2 confirms the real command emits distinct scorecard IDs.

recommended_work.title: Fix baseline A/B default run ID collision

deferred_work.title: Add eval determinism rerun harness
deferred_work.reason: Adjacent but broader than the confirmed bug.
